name: All Regions Covered
description: Sign-off requires that every symbolic region the decomposition identified — every edge case in the IPL model — has a generated test that was executed.
rationale: Test Generation & Coverage. The value of region decomposition is exhaustiveness: a finite set of regions that together cover all behaviour. Signing off with regions left untested re-introduces exactly the coverage gaps the formal model was meant to eliminate.

examples.passes: Every decomposed region has an executed test → CertificationSignoff
examples.fails: CertificationSignoff while several order-reject regions were never exercised

source: Imandra Connectivity / IPL — Imandra Protocol Language for formalizing FIX Rules of Engagement (https://www.imandra.ai/connectivity, https://ipl.dev).
